title: McKesson (MCK)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on McKesson using the latest actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what MCK is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-ibv6tnlg>
Derived by calculating the Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of McKesson's Free Cash Flow from FY2021 ($4091M) to FY2025 ($5548M). This anchors near-term projections precisely to actual historical performance rather than analyst speculation.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-ibv6tnlg>
Calculated as the 10-Year Treasury Yield (4.18%) plus McKesson's current Free Cash Flow Yield (4.71%). This dynamically adjusts the required return based on the actual cash yield the market is currently demanding for the stock.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-ibv6tnlg>
Computed strictly as exactly half of the 10-Year Treasury yield. This serves as a mathematically grounded, conservative proxy for long-term GDP growth, ensuring the terminal value doesn't artificially inflate the valuation.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
